item.title: Deadpool and Gossip Girl RUINED his Movie? #itendswithusmovie
item.itunes:title: Deadpool and Gossip Girl RUINED his Movie? #itendswithusmovie
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXKq2MxPSzI Blake Lively, who plays one of the leading roles in the popular TV series Gossip Girl, plays a kind-hearted, charming and understanding character. She recently filmed a movie, The End With Ue, which is The strange publicity method made netizens dig up a shocking incident. Blake Lively and her husband, actor Ryan Reynolds, who plays Deadpool, ignored and excluded director and protagonist Justin Baldoni, and even hired their own editor to cut out the movie they wanted. The video, as well as having Ryan Reynolds rewrite several scenes of the script and lines, made many netizens wonder if she had gone too far, and dug up videos of her bullying the interviewer during interviews in the past. This series of events made Blake Lively has plummeted, even to Ryan Reynolds. Prepare your popcorn and let us watch this Hollywood gossip incident. ============================================== Download Raid: Shadow Legends for free on iOS/Android/PC 👉 \"http://pl.go-ga.me/ayjm383z\" and get two powerful epic heroes + one legendary hero! ✅1 - Get the epic hero Tagor immediately after downloading ✅2 - Obtain the epic hero Tyrael after reaching level 15 ✅3 - From August 21st to October 23rd, log in for 7 consecutive days to get the legendary hero Loki! ️ 💥You can only get these rewards by downloading Raid: Legend of Shadows through my link! ============================================== Socials: https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #deadpool #deadpool3 #gossipgirl #ryanreynolds #itendswithusmovie
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXKq2MxPSzI Blake Lively, who plays one of the leading roles in the popular TV series Gossip Girl, plays a kind-hearted, charming and understanding character. She recently filmed a movie, The End With Ue, which is The strange publicity method made netizens dig up a shocking incident. Blake Lively and her husband, actor Ryan Reynolds, who plays Deadpool, ignored and excluded director and protagonist Justin Baldoni, and even hired their own editor to cut out the movie they wanted. The video, as well as having Ryan Reynolds rewrite several scenes of the script and lines, made many netizens wonder if she had gone too far, and dug up videos of her bullying the interviewer during interviews in the past. This series of events made Blake Lively has plummeted, even to Ryan Reynolds. item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXKq2MxPSzI Blake Lively, who plays one of the leading roles in the popular TV series Gossip Girl, plays a kind-hearted, charming and understanding character. She recently filmed a movie, The End With Ue, which is The strange publicity method made netizens dig up a shocking incident. Blake Lively and her husband, actor Ryan Reynolds, who plays Deadpool, ignored and excluded director and protagonist Justin Baldoni, and even hired their own editor to cut out the movie they wanted. The video, as well as having Ryan Reynolds rewrite several scenes of the script and lines, made many netizens wonder if she had gone too far, and dug up videos of her bullying the interviewer during interviews in the past. This series of events made Blake Lively has plummeted, even to Ryan Reynolds. item.title: The Democratic Party is DEAD. RFK Jr. Wages WAR. Endorses Trump
item.itunes:title: The Democratic Party is DEAD. RFK Jr. Wages WAR. Endorses Trump
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3k6jcBegffk Presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr. recently went scorched earth on the Democratic Party and endorsed Trump following the suspension of his campaign. In a 90 minute press conference he called out the Democratic Party, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden and the mainstream media. Find out what exactly happened to inspire this shocking turn of events in today's episode. item.title: The Olympic Breaking Situation is Insane
item.itunes:title: The Olympic Breaking Situation is Insane
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYVqlU0umKc Australian breakdancer Rachael Gunn, known by her stage name \"Raygun,\" faced significant backlash and criticism following her performance at the 2024 Paris Olympics. Her performance, which resulted in a score of zero points, sparked controversy and debate within the breaking community. Gunn's performance was widely mocked and criticized online, with many viewers questioning her qualifications and accusing her of \"mocking\" the sport. SOCIALS https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #raygun #olympicbreaking #rachelgunn #parisolympics

item.title: The END of Kamala Harris? #kamalaharris
item.itunes:title: The END of Kamala Harris? #kamalaharris
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkZ4vTDATOQ With 87 days left until the US presidential election, in today's video we'll look at major events from last week. One of these is the incident where current US Vice President Kamala Harris lost control and lashed out at voters in the swing state of Michigan. Another is the revelation by an influencer that Harris's team paid influencers to create videos attacking Trump. These two events have caused a significant public relations disaster. Most importantly, she has finally agreed to debate Trump. Today, we'll take a look at the exciting US presidential election! 00:00 Video starts 00:41 Influencers are avoiding her 05:42 Swing state incident 09:29 What are her policies? Sona English online course: https://hahow.in/courses/63abcd63770e61779597e6a6 Follow Sona: https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB Contact email: goodbikemob@gmail.com #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024 #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkZ4vTDATOQ With 87 days left until the US presidential election, in today's video we'll look at major events from last week. One of these is the incident where current US Vice President Kamala Harris lost control and lashed out at voters in the swing state of Michigan. Another is the revelation by an influencer that Harris's team paid influencers to create videos attacking Trump. These two events have caused a significant public relations disaster. Most importantly, she has finally agreed to debate Trump. Today, we'll take a look at the exciting US presidential election! 00:00 Video starts 00:41 Influencers are avoiding her 05:42 Swing state incident 09:29 What are her policies? item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HkZ4vTDATOQ With 87 days left until the US presidential election, in today's video we'll look at major events from last week. One of these is the incident where current US Vice President Kamala Harris lost control and lashed out at voters in the swing state of Michigan. Another is the revelation by an influencer that Harris's team paid influencers to create videos attacking Trump. These two events have caused a significant public relations disaster. Most importantly, she has finally agreed to debate Trump. Today, we'll take a look at the exciting US presidential election! 00:00 Video starts 00:41 Influencers are avoiding her 05:42 Swing state incident 09:29 What are her policies?
